actions.text: ## Key Decisions and Agreements
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Partnership Implementation Decided** - Careerspan will integrate with Remotely Good to power job matching for her 3,000+ newsletter subscribers. Theresa gets free access to Careerspan tech stack (resume optimization, career coaching, AI tools) to offer as premium perks. Careerspan gets supply-side candidates to match with employer partners. Revenue from employer placements will be split with Theresa as community owner. This solves her immediate need to build out B2C features while accelerating Careerspan's micro-community aggregation strategy.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Implementation Timeline** - Next steps: Ilsa (Careerspan Head of AI) will coordinate with Theresa to implement partnership, following the model recently deployed with "Happily Employed" founder. Logan (co-founder) will also join to handle community integration. Implementation appears lightweight on Theresa's side based on prior deployment. Vrijen will facilitate intros and provide oversight.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Multiple Introductions Committed** - Vrijen will introduce Theresa to: (1) Gemma Lenowitz at Semvid (economic mobility investor/accelerator), (2) Happily Employed founder (similar job board, potential collaboration), (3) Fohe.org (future of work/ed tech community), (4) Career Tech Founders Roundtable (monthly group, next meeting end of Sept). Also sharing two lists of Cornell VCs/angels (micro and large funds). Vrijen will post Theresa's fundraising blurb to Cornell VC group and connect her with Tony Chen (Cornell super-connector).
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Community Access for Theresa** - Vrijen will create custom trial code for Remotely Good community members to test Careerspan platform. Separate trial code provided for Theresa's personal use/exploration. This enables field testing before full integration.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: ## Strategic Context
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Theresa's Product Evolution:** Remotely Good started as newsletter (2023) focused on remote/hybrid social impact jobs. Grew to 3,000 subscribers through word of mouth. Evolved into holistic platform: job board + AI career tools + quick action opportunities (donations, petitions, calling congress). Recently rolled out tiered membership: $5/month (daily newsletter + AI resume/cover letter/interview prep), $30/3-months beta (ATS resume builder + VAPI voice agent for practice). Non-technical founder who taught herself low-code (Lovable.ai) through 30-50 hackathons in SF, placed in 10, met technical co-founder at one hackathon. Currently raising pre-seed round, pitching Transform VC and other impact investors.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Partnership Value Proposition:** Theresa was already exploring Careerspan before the call, wondering if partnership was possible because her MVP features weren't fully developed. She views Careerspan's advanced tech stack as "dream" partnership scenario. Key fit: (1) She needs B2C revenue drivers beyond what she can build solo/quickly, (2) Careerspan needs supply-side candidates from mission-oriented communities, (3) Both believe in micro-community aggregation model vs. Goliath platforms that "gobble up everything."
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Economic Mobility Alignment:** Both founders motivated by accessibility and reducing hidden curriculum barriers in career progression. Theresa has inequality studies background (Cornell minor), understands cultural capital gaps. Second-generation Nigerian, personally experienced lack of white-collar navigation support. Vrijen's McKinsey/Johnson School background exposed similar "hidden curriculum" that dictates career outcomes. Shared belief: career success shouldn't depend on resume-making ability or knowing unwritten rules.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: SF Ecosystem Context:** Theresa relocated from Western Mass to SF in 2024 specifically to access better startup resources. Described SF as "unique and eclectic" but sometimes needs "East Coast type-A energy." Building aggressively through Luma events, hackathons, networking. Trying to get plugged into Cornell NorCal community but fewer events than desired. Cornell Black Alumni Association connections in NYC/Manhattan.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: Owner:** Ilsa (Careerspan Head of AI) + Logan (co-founder)

actions.text: Purpose:** Operationalize the partnership quickly while Theresa is raising pre-seed. Demonstrates immediate value-add that she can reference in investor conversations. Establishes template for future micro-community integrations. Sets up long-term collaboration between aligned mission-driven founders in career tech space.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Partnership Implementation:** Ilsa (Head of AI) and Logan (co-founder) will reach out directly to schedule an implementation call. We'll use the model we just deployed with Happily Employed—lightweight on your side, gives you access to our full tech stack (coaching, resume tools, AI matching) as premium perks for your members, and we'll split employer revenue on placements. This should help accelerate your B2C offering while you focus on fundraising.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Cornell Network:** Attached are two lists of Cornell VCs and angels (micro funds + large funds). Once you send me your fundraising blurb, I'll post it to the Cornell VC group and connect you with Tony Chen—he's the Cornell super-connector who highlights startups to angels. You two already met at that Cornell Black Alumni event in Manhattan (the Lagos nightclub night!), so it'll be a warm reconnection.
actions.scheduling_reasoning: Normal priority tasks scheduled in 13-16:00 window

actions.text: **Intros Coming:** I'll introduce you to Gemma Lenowitz at Semvid (perfect for economic mobility focus + Techstars accelerator path) and the Happily Employed founder (peer learning, similar space). Also adding you to our Career Tech Founders Roundtable—next one is end of September, great group for partnerships and real talk.
